title: Trump retweets Aussie influencer Drew Pavlou, then calls Prime Minister
description: Trump retweets Aussie influencer Drew Pavlou, then calls Prime Minister.  #theissue #politics #trump #albanese

title: Social media post from Aussie influencer that sparked a call between Albanese and Trump | THE ISSUE
description: This week The Issue looks at the power of social media in the political world.  Brisbane based activist Drew Pavlou got  President Donald Trump interested in the plight of Iranian footballers.  It resulted in the President calling Anthony Albanese about the issue at 2 in the morning.  But for Pavlou social media is giving him more than influence and power, it is putting food table and $10 thousand in the bank each month.  He admits that unlike journalists he takes hard political stances, and discusses his shift from the left to the right of politics.  The 26 year old also tells the story of how he was blocked from entering the United States due to a post about pop star Billie Eilish. title: Middle East war escalates again
description: The war in the Middle East has escalated again with the US preparing to deploy Marines to the region, raising fears of 'boots on the ground'.   It comes as US forces struck the crown jewel in Iran's economy, Kharg Island. It's where 90 per cent of the nation's oil is stored. Iran is now threatening retaliation. #us #iran #middleeast
